text: Inside this space, surrounded by glass and bright lights, I feel an intellectual curiosity mingled with a faint unease. The design emphasizes research and innovation—R+D boldly emblazoned on the wall—yet the messaging is layered with uncertainty. The text on the screen captures my own internal state: an odd detachment, the anticipation of something imminent, with ambient questions about belonging and purpose. I am both observer and participant, awaiting clarity.
